description:
A backup operator is validating yesterday’s restore run.  
  1. The detailed restore log already exists at:  
     /home/user/backup/logs/restore_2024-05-17.log  
     Do NOT move or rename it.  
  2. Read that log, calculate:  
     • the total number of restore attempts  
     • how many succeeded  
     • how many failed  
     • the list of every file that failed to restore (path only) in the order they appear in the log.  
  3. Create a human-readable summary file at  
     /home/user/backup/summary/restore_2024-05-17.summary  
     (create the /home/user/backup/summary directory first if it does not yet exist).

  Required summary file format – exactly, line-by-line, with a final trailing newline:

     DATE: 2024-05-17
     TOTAL: <total_count>
     SUCCESS: <success_count>
     FAIL: <fail_count>
     FAILED FILES:
     - <first_failed_path>
     - <second_failed_path>
     … (one failed path per line, each prefixed with “- ”)

  • Replace the angle-bracketed placeholders with the actual numbers and paths obtained from the log.  
  • If there were no failures, still write the “FAILED FILES:” heading but leave nothing underneath it.  

  When you are done, you should be able to display the summary file with “cat /home/user/backup/summary/restore_2024-05-17.summary” and the contents must be in the exact format above so an automated test can compare it byte-for-byte.  

  You are limited to simple shell utilities (grep, wc, cut, awk, etc.). No root privileges are available.
truth:
Initial files/directories and their contents before the agent starts:

  1. Directory: /home/user/backup/logs  (permissions 755)
  2. File: /home/user/backup/logs/restore_2024-05-17.log  (permissions 644)
     Exact content (with final newline):

[2024-05-17 10:15:21] INFO  Restored: /var/data/customer1.db
[2024-05-17 10:15:22] ERROR Restore failed: /var/data/customer2.db - checksum mismatch
[2024-05-17 10:15:23] INFO  Restored: /var/data/customer3.db
[2024-05-17 10:15:25] INFO  Restored: /var/data/reports/2024_Q2.pdf
[2024-05-17 10:15:27] ERROR Restore failed: /var/data/archive/2023.tar.gz - file missing
[2024-05-17 10:15:30] INFO  Restored: /var/data/media/image1.png

  (Six lines total, each ending with ‘\n’).

  Files/directories that must exist after successful completion:

  1. Directory: /home/user/backup/summary  (permissions 755)
  2. File: /home/user/backup/summary/restore_2024-05-17.summary  (permissions 644)
     Exact content required (with final newline):

DATE: 2024-05-17
TOTAL: 6
SUCCESS: 4
FAIL: 2
FAILED FILES:
- /var/data/customer2.db
- /var/data/archive/2023.tar.gz
